purpose: P3 proof families are QA/report artifacts, not video manifests by default.

proofFamilies.name: route x state x role matrix
proofFamilies.command: manual/generated matrix from route registry and backlog

proofFamilies.name: evidence/audit lifecycle matrix
proofFamilies.command: manual/generated matrix from handlers and QA report

overclaimGuard: P3 artifacts prove coverage and safety boundaries; they are not customer workflow videos.
